multiplechoiceresponse.label: In the method described, what is jointly optimized to achieve ε-demographic parity?

choice.div: Only the logistic regression coefficients β.
Only the outcome labels, by flipping a fixed percentage per group.
Both β coefficients and which outcome labels to flip via (binary) optimization.
Neither; parity is achieved by removing protected attributes from the features.

div.p: The lecture states that, beyond maximizing the likelihood over β, the method also optimizes which labels to flip. A single optimization jointly selects β and label flips to meet the ε-parity constraint.
